Congress.gov · Bioguide · GovTrack · 2025
Influence Risk Score Methodology

Scores are calculated from publicly available records and weighted across these factors:

PAC DEPENDENCY
% of funding from corporate/industry PACs vs. small donors
DARK MONEY
501(c)(4) and undisclosed donor receipts
ETHICS RECORD
Official ethics committee findings, investigations, violations
REVOLVING DOOR
Prior industry lobbying or post-office employment conflicts
CONFLICTS
Personal financial interests in regulated industries
SECTOR OVERLAP
Committee assignments vs. top donor industries

Sources: FEC.gov · OpenSecrets.org · TrackAIPAC.com · Senate/House Ethics Committee · ProPublica · news investigations. Scores represent editorial judgments synthesized from these public records — not an official government rating. Members with $0 corporate PAC pledges (Sanders, AOC, Omar, etc.) are scored on other factors only.

Influential Money in Congress

Each diagram shows all 535 Congressional seats arranged in a hemicycle. Colored seats received donations from that industry. Gray seats have no recorded contributions from that source. Sources: TrackAIPAC.com, OpenSecrets, FEC filings.

Top 20 Corporate Political Donors to Congress

Ranked by total political contributions in the 2024 election cycle. Includes PAC donations, employee contributions & outside spending. Source: OpenSecrets.org · FEC.gov

Sources: OpenSecrets.org · FEC.gov · Center for Responsive Politics · 2023–2024 cycle. Party split bars show approximate R/D recipient percentages.

I decided to create this site because I have grown tired of the corruption in our government. I am tired of seeing our fellow neighbors struggle financially. I am tired of the discrimination of disenfranchised groups. I am tired of the hateful rhetoric, propaganda, and racism. I created this to help keep our representatives as transparent as possible. We must help educate one another and spread as much knowledge as we can. I have pulled data from the FEC, OpenSecrets, TrackAIPAC, BioGuide, etc. to form profiles for every member of Congress, the current Cabinet, our President, and our Supreme Court. I will make sure this is as up-to-date as possible. This site is meant to make it easy to determine for yourself whether or not you feel that your representative has your best interests in mind. Now more than ever, our votes matter.

If you are feeling generous, support me by buying me a coffee :)

Thank you for your support!

@keepdchonest
